title: Anthropic AI Engineering & Prompting
subtitle: Ship reliable products on Claude — the prompting, tools, and production patterns Anthropic actually recommends
description: A practical, source-grounded course on building with Anthropic's Claude. Built directly from Anthropic's published documentation, prompt engineering guides, and engineering blog. Covers the Claude API surface, prompt techniques the model is specifically tuned for (XML tags, prefilling, examples), tool use, the agentic loop, long-context patterns like contextual retrieval, and production essentials — caching, batches, evals, and safety. Pairs with the OpenAI course; together they give you both major AI labs covered.
audience: Engineers and AI product builders working on top of Anthropic's API who want the patterns Claude is actually trained for, not generic LLM advice. Comfortable reading code.
prerequisites: Have made at least one HTTP API call before
An Anthropic API key (free tier is fine)
outcomes: Understand Claude's model family and pick the right one for a task
Write prompts that use the techniques Claude is specifically trained for
Build tool-using agents with Claude's tool API
Use prompt caching and batches to control cost
Run evals and ship Claude-powered features safely to production

modules.title: Working with Claude
modules.summary: What Claude is, the model family, the Messages API, and how Claude responds to prompts compared to other LLMs.

lessons.title: Meet Claude — the model family and what each one is for
lessons.objective: Pick the right Claude (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) for a given task.

lessons.title: The Messages API — how to actually call Claude
lessons.objective: Make a Claude API call, understand the request/response shape, and handle multi-turn conversations.

lessons.title: System prompts that work
lessons.objective: Write system prompts using the structure Claude is tuned for.

lessons.title: Tokens, context windows, and pricing
lessons.objective: Estimate tokens, plan around context limits, and reason about Claude's cost model.

modules.title: Prompt Engineering for Claude
modules.summary: The prompting techniques Claude is specifically trained for: XML tags, examples, prefilling, chain-of-thought, and role assignment.

lessons.title: XML tags — Claude's preferred structure
lessons.objective: Use XML tags to delimit instructions, context, and examples reliably.

lessons.title: Few-shot examples and how Claude uses them
lessons.objective: Build example sets that nudge Claude toward your target output.

lessons.title: Prefilling and shaping Claude's response
lessons.objective: Use response prefilling to lock format and skip preambles.

lessons.title: Chain-of-thought prompting that actually helps
lessons.objective: Add thinking steps to prompts where they improve quality, skip them where they don't.

modules.title: Tool Use and Agents
modules.summary: Claude's tool-use API, the agentic loop, parallel tool calls, and MCP for connecting to external systems.

lessons.title: Tool use — letting Claude call your functions
lessons.objective: Define a tool, handle Claude's tool_use response, and return tool_result.

lessons.title: The agent loop with Claude
lessons.objective: Build a multi-step agent that uses tools to complete a goal.

lessons.title: Parallel tool calls and structured outputs
lessons.objective: Use parallel tool calls and JSON schemas to get structured data reliably.

lessons.title: MCP — Model Context Protocol in production
lessons.objective: Connect Claude to external systems via MCP servers instead of one-off integrations.

modules.title: Long Context, RAG, and Documents
modules.summary: How to use Claude's long context window well — contextual retrieval, citations, PDFs, and large document workflows.

lessons.title: Long context with Claude — when to stuff vs. retrieve
lessons.objective: Decide between long-context stuffing and RAG for your data size and access pattern.

lessons.title: Contextual Retrieval — Anthropic's RAG upgrade
lessons.objective: Apply Contextual Retrieval to drop retrieval failures by 40-67%.

lessons.title: Citations — grounding Claude's answers in sources
lessons.objective: Use Claude's citation features to return verifiable answers.

lessons.title: PDFs, documents, and vision with Claude
lessons.objective: Pass PDFs and images directly to Claude for parsing and analysis.

modules.title: Production with Claude
modules.summary: Prompt caching, batch processing, evals, safety, and the launch checklist for Claude-powered features.

lessons.title: Prompt caching with Claude — 90% cost cuts on repeated context
lessons.objective: Use cache_control breakpoints to slash bills on repeated prompts.

lessons.title: Message Batches API — 50% off for offline workloads
lessons.objective: Process large batches at half price within 24 hours.

lessons.title: Evals and quality control for Claude apps
lessons.objective: Build an eval set for Claude that catches regressions before users do.

lessons.title: Safety and the Claude production checklist
lessons.objective: Apply Anthropic's safety patterns and ship Claude features confidently.
